prerequisite: PC within 60 ft just started casting a spell Aelric can see; uses Aelric's reaction
narration: He snaps his fingers — frost crackles in the air between his hand and the caster, and their magic shatters into glittering motes.

roll.label: Counterspell ability check
roll.notes: Auto-counters spells of level 3 or lower (Counterspell is cast at 3rd-level). For 4th-level+ spells, this roll must beat DC **10 + spell level** to negate. DM tracks reaction usage — Counterspell shares Aelric's one-per-round reaction slot with Shield.

narration: Aelric extends a frost-rimed hand; a beam of pale cold lances out, leaving a trail of crystallizing air.
He sweeps both hands skyward — hailstones the size of fists rip down through a 20-ft cylinder of swirling cold.

prerequisite: free hand for somatic; not wearing armor
narration: He traces a sigil in the air around himself — a faint blue shimmer settles like a second skin.
effect: Aelric's AC becomes **15** for 8 hours (or until dispelled / another instance is cast on him). Usually already active when combat starts — only recast if dispelled.

prerequisite: Aelric must be conscious; uses one of 3 daily slots
narration: Mist coils around him for an instant — and then he's gone, reappearing 30 ft. away in a swirl of frost.
effect: **Bonus action.** Aelric teleports up to **30 ft.** to an unoccupied space he can see. Does not trigger opportunity attacks. (3/day — track uses; refresh on long rest.)

prerequisite: Aelric was hit by an attack or targeted by Magic Missile; uses Aelric's reaction
narration: A wall of invisible force flickers into being at the last instant, deflecting the blow.
effect: **Reaction.** +5 AC against the triggering attack (often turns a hit into a miss) AND until the start of Aelric's next turn. Also auto-negates Magic Missile. Shares reaction slot with Counterspell.

narration: Hocks a glob of supercooled bile from a glacial gland in its throat.
Throws its head back and bellows a wave of stinging frost.
It lunges, raking with two crystalline claws and snapping its rime-fanged maw.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.rider_on_hit: DC 15 Str save vs grappled (escape DC 15)

prerequisite: Stalker must move at least 20 ft. straight at the target this turn
pre_save: DC 15 Str save vs prone (target gets disadvantage on the bite to-hit if knocked prone — DM, apply if save fails)
narration: Coils, then explodes off the ice and slams shoulder-first.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.rider_on_hit: DC 15 Str save vs grappled (escape DC 15)

trigger: auto-trigger when Stalker is hit in melee within 5 ft
narration: Shards of ice erupt where the blow lands.
Folds itself into a snowdrift; only the steam of its breath gives it away.

roll.label: Stealth
roll.notes: Compare result to each PC's passive Perception; PCs whose PP > result are fooled.
